overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk urban environment at night, featuring neon-lit corridors, elevated walkways, and panoramic city views. The footage shows a player character navigating through industrial storage areas, balconies, and arcades with vibrant neon lighting in green, red, and blue hues. This is game engine footage from a futuristic open-world game.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light, featuring arcade machines and a hanging red lantern. The space has a gritty, industrial feel with corrugated metal walls and makeshift furniture before transitioning back outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a series of claustrophobic industrial corridors that repeatedly open up into expansive, neon-lit urban vistas. It begins in a narrow storage hallway bathed in green neon, moving past cluttered shelving and a circular sign before emerging onto an elevated balcony that reveals a towering cityscape of digital billboards. The camera then retreats back into yellow and green industrial corridors and corrugated walls, only to transition onto an elevated walkway with metal grating where it passes a pedestrian against the backdrop of the skyline. This path leads into a gritty, red-lit arcade space filled with machines and hanging lanterns before finally opening onto a wide rooftop terrace. The movement concludes among blue neon hydroponic planters, settling into a serene atmosphere as a figure stands by the railing overlooking the glowing city.
